zh.lifeSummary: 當Æthelreda of Northumbria於大約1065年出生時，她的父親Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria27歲，母親Æthelreda of England24歲。她和Duncan至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1095年在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

en.lifeSummary: When Æthelreda of Northumbria was born about 1065, her father, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, was 27 and her mother, Æthelreda of England, was 24. She had at least 1 son with Duncan. She died about 1095, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 32.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Æthelreda of Northumbria è nata il circa 1065, sua padre, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Æthelreda of England, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Duncan. Morì circa 1095, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 32 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Æthelreda of Northumbria(이)가 대략 1065년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Æthelreda of England(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Duncan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Allerdale, Cumbria, England: аллирдеил белоу дирвент, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Æthelreda of Northumbria родилась около 1065 г., её отцу по имени Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Æthelreda of England, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Duncan. Она умерла около 1095 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет.
